name: Nut Cutlets
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Groundnuts (roasted and put through a mincing machine)
Worcestershire sauce or tomato/H.P. sauce to flavour
Juice of one lemon (to bind it well)
recipeInstructions:
Melt the fat and add the flour gradually, stirring until combined.
Add the liquid slowly, continuing to stir until boiling.
Gradually incorporate the minced nuts and other ingredients.
Stir over heat until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
Turn off heat and spread mixture onto a wet plate, cutting into even pieces.
When cooled, shape into cutlets and dust with flour.
Brush with beaten egg or milk.
Serve with tomato sauce. This recipe can also be used for making egg cutlets by substituting 3 hard-boiled eggs for the nuts.
